final:
module DFF (
    input wire D,
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg Q
);
  wire _tap_D = D & {1{1'b1}};

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            Q <= 1'b0; // Asynchronous reset
        end else begin
            Q <= D; // Edge-triggered behavior
        end
    end
endmodule
